brand.name: Appibrium
brand.description: Appibrium is an engineering company that designs, builds, and scales intelligent technologies across software, AI, cloud infrastructure, embedded systems, and IoT. We partner with startups, businesses, and organizations to create reliable, future-ready solutions that solve real-world problems.
brand.mission: To engineer meaningful technology that empowers people, businesses, and communities through intelligent, scalable, and reliable solutions.
brand.vision: To become a globally trusted engineering company shaping the future through innovation, research, and technology.

services.name: AI Engineering
services.description: Designing intelligent systems and features that automate workflows and enhance user experience.

services.name: Software Engineering
services.description: Building scalable, reliable, and maintainable software for real-world applications.

services.name: Cloud Infrastructure
services.description: Designing secure and scalable cloud infrastructure for modern digital products.

services.name: Embedded Systems
services.description: Designing and developing customized hardware systems.

services.name: Internet of Things (IoT)
services.description: Creating smart, connected hardware solutions integrating sensors, devices, and real-time data.

services.name: Product Engineering
services.description: Fusing research, design, and engineering to create end-to-end scalable technologies.

services.name: Research & Innovation
services.description: Exploring next-generation technologies to solve complex real-world problems.

visual_identity.design_concept: Appibrium contrasts the mysterious, structured depth of Forest Depth (representing stable foundations, organic growth, and balance) with an energetic, glowing Electric Mint (representing innovation, technology, and future direction).

night.recommended_usage: Base background for dark mode interfaces and dark icons.

deep.recommended_usage: Alternate backgrounds, cards, nested boxes, and elevations.

forest.recommended_usage: Borders, grid lines, subtle highlights, and deep green accents.

mint.recommended_usage: Main brand color, interactive buttons, glow elements, active links, and highlights.

deep_mint.recommended_usage: Active states, hover states, filled buttons, and secondary accents.

snow.recommended_usage: Light theme background, clear high-contrast cards. Eliminates harsh white glare.

white.recommended_usage: Clean text contrast on dark backgrounds.

primary.recommended_usage: Display headlines, hero titles, and corporate signature typography.

secondary.recommended_usage: Body copy, taglines, guidelines, labels, and UI controls.

standalone_icon.description: Standalone brand mark variants optimized for avatars, profile pictures, and compact layout elements.

horizontal_lockup.description: Standard corporate lockup containing icon + brand wordmark, ideal for site navigation and header segments.

w4_lockup.description: Editorial branding lockup with vertical separator and left-stacked tagline. Recommended for documentation covers, reports, and publication banners.

wordmark.description: Typography-only brand signature, optimal when vertical height is constrained and icon is unnecessary.

wordmark_clean.description: Tagline-free typography brand signature for streamlined visual layouts.

stacked_logo.description: Centered square logo configuration, best for square profiles, apparel branding, and social avatar marks.

elements.description: Social media cover and profile logo elements for digital channels.

social_cover.description: Appibrium social media channel cover banner graphic.

social_logo.description: Appibrium social media profile logo symbol graphic.

compliance_and_rules.clear_space: Keep at least 25% height-equivalent padding zone (clear space) around all standalone icons and logotypes.
compliance_and_rules.accent_ratio: Limit Electric Mint (#00E090) accent to a maximum of 10-15% of the total layout surface to keep visual aesthetic values high.
compliance_and_rules.alignment: Always left-align typography when utilizing standard lockups. Tagline segments must never be centered independently of the name spans.

dos.description: Use the dark lockup on Night, Deep Forest, or dark-themed interfaces for solid contrast.
Keep at least 25% height-equivalent padding zone around all standalone icons and logotypes.

donts.description: Never place the white-wordmark dark lockup on light backgrounds or low-contrast containers.
Never modify or squeeze the logo aspect ratios. Scale them proportionally to preserve geometric proportions.
